description_long: This office building features a modern, rectilinear design with a mix of white and dark gray exterior surfaces, accented by large glass windows and a prominent central entrance. The structure is set on a raised platform, with a landscaped area including a tree and some greenery visible near the building. The roofline is flat, with a section of metal railing and what appears to be rooftop equipment or utilities. The windows are arranged in a regular, horizontal banding pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is recessed and flanked by glass panels, suggesting a welcoming lobby area. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, typical of contemporary urban office architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed office building with white and dark gray facades, large horizontal windows, and a landscaped area with a tree near the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large horizontal windows, and a landscaped area with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's flat roof, rooftop railing, and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional windows, rooftop equipment, and the continuation of the landscaped area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the building's secondary entrance, more windows, and the tree from a different angle.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced along the facade.
